flow_points: England started their innings strong, scoring 57 runs in the Powerplay.
They lost 2 wickets during this initial phase, maintaining a run rate of 9.5.
HC Brook was crucial for England, contributing 28.8% of the team's total runs.
In response, Nepal scored 47 runs in their Powerplay.
Nepal also lost 2 wickets during their Powerplay, with a run rate of 7.83.
LA Dawson delivered a crucial bowling spell during Nepal's chase.
Dawson's spell yielded 2 wickets for just 21 runs from 4 overs.
This performance by LA Dawson was identified as a key turning point.
Dawson sustained defensive pressure, finishing with an impactful score of 92.89.
England ultimately secured a narrow victory, winning by 4 runs.
